title: philotheca ciliata
intro: Philotheca ciliata, also known as Westringia ciliata, is a shrubby plant native to Australia, belonging to the family Lamiaceae, which includes mint and basil plants. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. Consuming Philotheca ciliata may provide various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues and reducing anxiety. In herbal preparations, Philotheca ciliata can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, making it a popular choice in natural remedies.
